title: CG-CAHPS 3.0 — core reporting items (adult)
license: US Government public domain (AHRQ). Free to use; do not misrepresent as endorsed by AHRQ. CAHPS rule: dropping/altering core items forfeits the CAHPS name and cross-site comparability.

provenance.attribution: CAHPS Clinician and Group Survey 3.0 Measures. Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality, Rockville, MD.
provenance.wording_note: Stems below are the official AHRQ measure descriptions (verbatim). The FULL field wording (the 'In the last 6 months, how often did...' lead-in and exact option labels) lives in the core instrument (Clinician & Group Survey 3.0 ZIP, Adult, English/Spanish). Confirm exact field wording + Spanish (validated) from the ZIP before fielding: https://www.ahrq.gov/cahps/surveys-guidance/cg/index.html

ru_status: draft_forward_translation — NOT validated. First-pass RU for reconciliation only; must go through TRAPD (see survey-translation-adaptation references) before use. verbatim_ok=false for RU.

rating_0_10.en: 0 = Worst provider possible … 10 = Best provider possible
rating_0_10.ru_draft: 0 = Самый плохой врач … 10 = Самый лучший врач

items.en_stem: Patient got appointment for urgent care as soon as needed
items.ru_draft: Пациент получал приём по срочной помощи так быстро, как это было нужно
items.field_frame_en: In the last 6 months, when you needed care right away, how often did you get care as soon as you needed?

items.en_stem: Patient got appointment for non-urgent care as soon as needed
items.ru_draft: Пациент получал плановый приём так быстро, как это было нужно
items.field_frame_en: In the last 6 months, how often did you get an appointment for a check-up or routine care as soon as you needed?

items.en_stem: Patient got answer to medical question the same day he/she contacted provider's office
items.ru_draft: Пациент получал ответ на медицинский вопрос в тот же день, когда обращался в кабинет врача
items.field_frame_en: In the last 6 months, when you contacted this provider's office during regular office hours, how often did you get an answer to your medical question that same day?

items.en_stem: Provider explained things in a way that was easy to understand
items.ru_draft: Врач объяснял всё понятным для вас образом

items.en_stem: Provider showed respect for what patient had to say
items.ru_draft: Врач с уважением относился к тому, что вы говорили

items.en_stem: Provider spent enough time with patient
Provider knew important information about patient's medical history
items.ru_draft: Врач знал важную информацию о вашей истории болезни

items.en_stem: Someone from provider's office followed up with patient to give results of blood test, x-ray, or other test
items.ru_draft: Кто-то из кабинета врача связывался с вами, чтобы сообщить результаты анализа крови, рентгена или другого исследования

items.en_stem: Someone from provider's office talked about all prescription medications being taken
items.ru_draft: Кто-то из кабинета врача обсуждал с вами все принимаемые вами рецептурные лекарства
Регистраторы и администраторы были готовы помочь
items.note: Composite: Helpful, Courteous, and Respectful Office Staff.

items.en_stem: Clerks and receptionists were courteous and respectful
items.ru_draft: Регистраторы и администраторы были вежливы и уважительны
items.note: Composite: Helpful, Courteous, and Respectful Office Staff.

items.field_frame_en: Using any number from 0 to 10, where 0 is the worst provider possible and 10 is the best provider possible, what number would you use to rate this provider?
items.note: Standard overall-experience anchor; also serves overall_satisfaction.
